## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and production progress.](https://fathom.video/share/ZoTdp4gft2AvDNg9-H_p21dkHCki9hCu?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [9 articles scheduled this week; 3 queued for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/ZoTdp4gft2AvDNg9-H_p21dkHCki9hCu?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Multi-agent content being prioritized; 28 items in review queue](https://fathom.video/share/ZoTdp4gft2AvDNg9-H_p21dkHCki9hCu?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Team comfortable with current content direction](https://fathom.video/share/ZoTdp4gft2AvDNg9-H_p21dkHCki9hCu?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [3 articles queued for publishing in the coming days](https://fathom.video/share/ZoTdp4gft2AvDNg9-H_p21dkHCki9hCu?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Team focusing on prioritizing content about AI agents](https://fathom.video/share/ZoTdp4gft2AvDNg9-H_p21dkHCki9hCu?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [28 different items currently sitting in the review queue](https://fathom.video/share/ZoTdp4gft2AvDNg9-H_p21dkHCki9hCu?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)

      - [Discussion about avoiding calling out specific modules](https://fathom.video/share/ZoTdp4gft2AvDNg9-H_p21dkHCki9hCu?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
